steps: Take a Becker and add 50 mL of distiled water and a magnetic mixer. Add the sodium phosphate Sodium phosphate monobasic monohydrate Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #S9638
Add the sodium hydroxide to the previous solution Sodium Hydroxide Fisher Scientific Catalog #BP359500
Add the glucose to the previous solution and wait until thesolution is transparent without pellets. Glucose P212121 Catalog #Glucose
creator: Diogo B. Provete
